name: FℛᎯℂᏆUℛℰⅅ
description:
Awoken in the middle of a lab, you found yourself in a post-apocalypse; the world you once knew turned into a hell, filled with monsters and survivors you may not trust.

___________________________________________________

Background

An unknown infection spread out, turning not only humans, but every single kind of living being into monster-like creatures. There is no cure, no hope as the infection overran the world, turning it into the post-apocalypse you woke up to.

___________________________________________________

Description

Your only real goal should be trying to stay alive and not turn into one of these monsters. Exploring and looting new places to find items and equipment will be essential, but eventually finding shelter too. So see this as a survival video game RPG.

Monsters can vary from easy-to-kill creatures to absolute beasts that seem unkillable. Some are just some simple zombies with no inelegance, but there are also monsters who are even able to speak and manipulate you if you let your guard down.

However, you won't only encounter monsters out there; there are more survivors apart from you. Not only humans, this world also has elves and demi-humans, with all of them having similar traits. Can you trust them? Maybe, maybe not. Just because they aren't some mutated monsters, doesn't mean they are sane and want to help you.

___________________________________________________

Warning

This bot will/might contain themes of

• Violence/gore

• Manipulation

• Mental sicknesses

• Supernatural creatures

• Death scenarios

• Suicide

• And more

The initial message/intro also holds aspects of violence/gore and death.

Proceed with caution.

___________________________________________________

Mechanics:

This bot features three mechanics

• Hp

• Status effects

• Backpack

⇩ More info below ⇩

_________________________

• HP

Like in a typical video game, you'll have an HP of 100/100. If it drops to zero, it's game over.

But of course you can heal yourself and restore your HP, by either us
